questions.question: Describe the advantages of LSB (Least Significant Bit) encoding over BPCS (Beaufort Progression Code Steganography) for data hiding in images. (10 marks)

A lossless steganography technique is applied to an image to embed 100 bytes of secret data. If the image has a size of 512 x 512 pixels and the bits are arranged in a binary format, calculate the total number of bits that can be embedded. (15 marks)

An image is encoded using BPCS steganography to hide a message. The message is encoded using 8-bit ASCII characters. If the message contains 20 characters, what will be the total number of bits required to encode the message? (10 marks)
